subject: Kingship administration roadmap
value: Do not silently extend or reorder the agreed Kingship roadmap. Phase 2 ends with Batch 3H; any additional databases are optional backlog unless Mandla explicitly approves them as required work.

source.conversation_topic: User correction after an unapproved Batch 3I suggestion

subject: Generated software projects
value: Save or export generated ZIPs and source files before a long generation session ends; a build is not safely complete until its deliverables are preserved.
